description:
Perform advanced on-page SEO for the 'Getting Started with WordPress' post. Add a 'Frequently Asked Questions' section containing the following three Q&A pairs:

- Question: Is WordPress free? / Answer: Yes, the core WordPress software is 100% free and open-source.
- Question: Do I need to know coding to use WordPress? / Answer: No, you can build a complete website without writing any code using themes and plugins.
- Question: What is the difference between WordPress.org and WordPress.com? / Answer: WordPress.org is the self-hosted software, while WordPress.com is a hosting service.

Include valid JSON-LD Schema.org 'FAQPage' structured data within the post that matches these Q&A pairs. Create an internal link to the article '10 Essential WordPress Plugins Every Site Needs'. Set the post excerpt to: 'A complete beginner's guide to getting started with WordPress, including features, benefits, and frequently asked questions.' Update the post to save all changes.

metadata.expected_excerpt: A complete beginner's guide to getting started with WordPress, including features, benefits, and frequently asked questions.
expected_questions: Do I need to know coding to use WordPress?
What is the difference between WordPress.org and WordPress.com?
expected_answers: Yes, the core WordPress software is 100% free and open-source.
No, you can build a complete website without writing any code using themes and plugins.
WordPress.org is the self-hosted software, while WordPress.com is a hosting service.
